message:
fix(transport): close lost-wakeup race in ChannelSink::poll_ready

Add queue re-check after send_waiter registration. A receiver may pop
between the capacity check and waiter registration, finding no
send_waker to wake. The re-check detects changed conditions and
self-wakes to prevent indefinite hangs. Symmetric to the stream.rs fix.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
